---
name: Provider request
about: Request support for a new infrastructure provider
title: "[PROVIDER] "
labels: provider
assignees: ""
---

**Which cloud platform or infrastructure tool does this target?**
(e.g., Google Cloud Platform, Microsoft Azure, Terraform, Kubernetes)

**Describe the desired provider behavior**
Detail the expected template format, required deployment commands, authentication methods, and status polling logs.

**Example minimal configuration / deployment template**
Provide a short config snippet showing how users would define this provider in `stacktest.yaml`.

**Additional Context**
Include any SDK client libraries, API references, or resources that would assist in the implementation of this provider.
